title: Miconia jamesluteynii
taxonomy: Miconia jamesluteynii is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. The Miconia jamesluteynii is endemic to Ecuador and is found in the Andes mountain range. It is a member of the Miconia genus, which is one of the largest genera of flowering plants in the world. The classification of Miconia jamesluteynii is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, and the order Myrtales. This classification indicates the plant's position within the broader plant kingdom and its evolutionary relationships with other organisms.
